description: Tools for discovering Cambodia's cultural festivals and events. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to recommend trips that align with upcoming festivals and help users plan around cultural events.

tools.name: list_festivals
tools.description: List upcoming Cambodia cultural festivals and events. Use when the user asks about events, festivals, or wants to plan a trip around a cultural experience. Supports filtering by month, year, province, and category (Religious, Cultural, National, Regional).
tools.returns: Paginated list of FestivalSummary objects with id, slug, name, start_date, end_date, location, category, is_featured

tools.name: get_festival_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific festival including description, history, travel tips, GPS coordinates, and any associated discount code for trip bookings during the festival period.
tools.returns: FestivalDetail with description, history, travel_tips, latitude, longitude, discount_code (code, discount_percentage, valid_until)

tools.name: get_festival_related_trips
tools.description: Get trip packages that are related to or themed around a specific festival. Use to recommend bookable trips to the user when they show interest in a cultural event.
tools.returns: Array of trip objects related to the festival
